---
title: "[2026 Spring] p-adic Hodge Theory Seminar"
subtitle: "p-adic Hodge theory & Fargues–Fontaine curve"
format:
    html:
        toc: true
        toc-depth: 2
        number-sections: false
        include-in-header:
            text: |
                <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
    typst: default
---

## Overview

-   **Time:** Monday 1-4 PM
-   **Topics**
    -   Introductory $p$-adic Hodge theory
    -   Integral $p$-adic Hodge theory
    -   The Fargues–Fontaine curve
-   **References**
    -   Hong. *Lecture notes on* $p$-adic Hodge theory.
    -   Brinon & Conrad. *CMI Summer School Notes on* $p$-adic Hodge Theory.
    -   Kisin. Crystalline representations and $F$-crystals.

## Schedule

| Week |      Date      | Topic                                                |
|--------------:|:-------------:|:-----------------------------------------|
|    1 |   2026-03-02   | *No meeting*                                         |
|    2 |   2026-03-09   | Introduction                                         |
|    3 |   2026-03-16   | Finite flat group schemes                            |
|    4 |   2026-03-23   | $p$-divisible groups 1                               |
|    5 |   2026-03-30   | $p$-divisible groups 2 / Period rings and functors 1 |
|    6 |   2026-04-06   | Period rings and functors 2                          |
|    7 |   2026-04-13   | Period rings and functors 3                          |
|    8 |   2026-04-20   | *No meeting (midterm exam)*                          |
|    9 |   2026-04-27   | Period rings and functors 4                          |
|   10 |   2026-05-04   | Integral $p$-adic Hodge theory 1                     |
|   11 |   2026-05-11   | Integral $p$-adic Hodge theory 2                     |
|   12 |   2026-05-18   | Integral $p$-adic Hodge theory 3                     |
|   13 | ~~2026-05-25~~ | *No meeting (Holiday)*                               |
|   14 |   2026-06-01   | The Fargues–Fontaine curve                           |
|   15 | ~~2026-06-08~~ | *Cancelled*                                          |
|   16 |   2026-06-15   | *No meeting (final exam)*                            |
